# Islam.wiki

A comprehensive Islamic knowledge base. Quran, Hadith, classical books, biographies, and encyclopedic articles. Free forever.

**Live:** [islam.wiki](https://islam.wiki)

## Quick Links

- [[Getting Started]] -- set up local development
- [[Architecture]] -- how the platform is built
- [[Features]] -- full feature list with status
- [[Content Pipeline]] -- how data is sourced and processed
- [[Theological Guidelines]] -- content standards and methodology
- [[Contributing]] -- how to contribute

## About

Islam.wiki provides authentic Islamic scholarship in an accessible, searchable format. All content follows Ahl us-Sunnah wal-Jamaah methodology with verified sources and scholarly consensus.

The platform includes:
- Full Quran with Arabic, translations, and tafsir (Ibn Kathir, Al-Jalalayn)
- All major Hadith collections with grading and isnad visualization
- Classical Islamic books and scholarly works
- Biographical entries for historical Islamic figures
- Encyclopedic articles on Islamic topics
